    • runDescription

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage runDescription(Optional<String> runDescription)

      Description of the run. If run exists, description will be updated.

    • runDescription

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage runDescription(String runDescription)

    • metadata

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage metadata(Optional<Object> metadata)

      Metadata of the dataset run, updates run if run already exists

    • metadata

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage metadata(Object metadata)

    • observationId

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage observationId(Optional<String> observationId)

    • observationId

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage observationId(String observationId)

    • traceId

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage traceId(Optional<String> traceId)

      traceId should always be provided. For compatibility with older SDK versions it can also be inferred from the provided observationId.

    • traceId

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage traceId(String traceId)

    • datasetVersion

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage datasetVersion(Optional<OffsetDateTime> datasetVersion)

      ISO 8601 timestamp (RFC 3339, Section 5.6) in UTC (e.g., "2026-01-21T14:35:42Z"). Specifies the dataset version to use for this experiment run. If provided, the experiment will use dataset items as they existed at or before this timestamp. If not provided, uses the latest version of dataset items.

    • datasetVersion

      CreateDatasetRunItemRequest._FinalStage datasetVersion(OffsetDateTime datasetVersion)
